pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam DC for the Q3 electronic component stock. We've got some weird discrepancies between our WMS and the physical count. Can you look at this table and tell me if you see any patterns or possible reasons for the shrinkage?

| SKU | Description | System Count | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| CAP-992-X | 10uF Ceramic Capacitor | 14,205 | 14,192 | -13 |
| RES-441-B | 1k Ohm Resistor (SMD) | 88,400 | 88,385 | -15 |
| IND-002-K | 10mH Inductor | 2,150 | 2,144 | -6 |
| DIO-773-L | Zener Diode 5.1V | 5,600 | 5,591 | -9 |
| TRANS-12-J | NPN Transistor | 3,420 | 3,412 | -8 |

The numbers are small but it's happening across different categories. Any ideas what's going on?

pool.baseline:

[2023-10-27 14:22:01] ERROR: Uncaught Exception in PaymentGatewayHandler: NullPointerException at com.store.payment.GatewayImpl.authorize(GatewayImpl.java:142)
[2023-10-27 14:22:05] ERROR: Connection timeout occurred while communicating with third-party auth service.
[2023-10-27 14:22:10] ERROR: Database connection pool exhausted.

any idea what the most likely architectural cause is?
